storyBeat: 火滅了 — 誰要去拿火?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的故事要認識 4 個字！
🔑 girl = 女孩
🔑 forest = 森林
🔑 father = 爸爸
🔑 fire = 火
記住這 4 個字，Vasilisa 的故事就要開始了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A girl named Vasilisa lived at the edge of a dark forest.
questions.explanationZh: 有個叫 Vasilisa 的女孩，住在一片黑黑的森林旁邊。奶奶說，光是住在那裡，就已經很需要勇氣了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from today's story.
questions.explanationZh: 這幾組詞剛剛在故事裡都出現過，配對看看，記不記得？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her mother was gone. Her father had a new wife.
questions.explanationZh: 她的媽媽不在了。爸爸娶了新太太。奶奶說這話的時候，輕輕嘆了一口氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each day Vasilisa worked from dawn to dark, alone.
questions.questionEn: Was the new woman kind to her?
questions.explanationZh: 從天亮做到天黑，還是「一個人」——新太太這樣對她，哪裡稱得上善良？答案當然是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 每天從天亮做到天黑，一個人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa lived at the edge of a dark forest.
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 住在一片黑黑的森林旁邊。
questions.question: Where did Vasilisa live?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說她住在黑黑的森林旁邊，選「在黑森林旁邊」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa did not cry. She did the work and kept quiet.
questions.explanationZh: Vasilisa 沒有哭。她把事情做完，安安靜靜地，一個字也沒多說。奶奶說，這樣的小孩，心裡很強。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She held her tears inside and kept her face still.
questions.question: How did Vasilisa act?
questions.explanationZh: 眼淚憋著不掉、臉也不動——她是在咬牙撐著自己，把心裡所有委屈都吞下去。
questions.sentenceZh: 她把眼淚憋在心裡，臉上一動也不動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa's mother was gone. Her father had a new wife.
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 的媽媽不在了，爸爸娶了新太太。
questions.questionEn: Did Vasilisa still have her real mother?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說她媽媽不在了——親生媽媽已經走了，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One cold night, the fire in the small house went out.
questions.explanationZh: 有一個冷冷的夜，小屋裡的火滅了。火一滅，屋子馬上就冷了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No fire. The house gets cold. No hot food.
questions.question: Why was the fire going out a big problem?
questions.explanationZh: 沒火就沒暖氣、沒熱飯——一個冬天的晚上沒有火，那就是又冷又餓啊！
questions.sentenceZh: 沒有火。屋子變冷了。沒有熱食。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Each day Vasilisa worked from dawn to dark, alone.
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 每天從天亮做到天黑，一個人。
questions.question: What does working 'from dawn to dark' mean?
questions.explanationZh: 天亮就開始、天黑才停——這就是工作「一整天」，沒有休息。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What season did this happen in?
questions.question: What season?
questions.explanationZh: 故事裡說「冷冷的夜」——一到冬天才會這麼冷，答案就是冬天！
questions.sentenceZh: 這件事發生在哪個季節？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new woman looked at Vasilisa and smiled with cold eyes.
questions.question: What kind of person is the new woman?
questions.explanationZh: 她笑著，但眼睛是冷的——奶奶說，這樣的笑，不是真的善意，是笑裡藏刀。
questions.sentenceZh: 新太太看著 Vasilisa，帶著冷冷的眼神笑了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One cold night, the fire in the small house went out.
questions.sentenceZh: 有一個冷冷的夜，小屋裡的火滅了。
questions.questionEn: Was the night warm when the fire went out?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說那是個「冷冷的夜」——答 No，天氣是冷的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Go," she said. "Go into the deep woods. Get fire from Baba Yaga."
questions.explanationZh: 「去，」她說，「到深深的樹林裡去。去跟 Baba Yaga 拿火。」奶奶說完這句，停了一下——因為這個名字，沒有人能輕輕鬆鬆說出口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The new woman looked at Vasilisa with cold eyes.
questions.sentenceZh: 新太太用冷冷的眼神看著 Vasilisa。
questions.question: What kind of look did the new woman give?
questions.explanationZh: 冷冷的眼神——就是「冷漠又不友善」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Go," she said. "Go into the deep woods. Get fire from Baba Yaga."
questions.sentenceZh: 「去，」她說，「到深深的樹林裡去，跟 Baba Yaga 拿火。」
questions.question: Who sent Vasilisa into the forest?
questions.explanationZh: 是新太太命令她去的——說了「去」，叫她去跟 Baba Yaga 拿火。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She held her tears inside and kept her face still.
questions.sentenceZh: 她把眼淚憋在心裡，臉上一動也不動。
questions.questionEn: Could people easily see how Vasilisa felt?
questions.explanationZh: 她臉上一動也不動——外面的人看不出她的感受，答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚 4 個字，記住它們！
🔑 name = 名字
🔑 deep = 深
🔑 doll = 娃娃
🔑 pocket = 口袋
其中「娃娃」是今晚最重要的角色——等你聽到就知道了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa stood at the door. The night wind was loud.
questions.explanationZh: Vasilisa 站在門口，夜風嗚嗚地吹。奶奶說，她就站在那裡，很小的一個人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 這幾組詞剛剛在故事裡都出現過，來配對看看！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She did not turn back. She did not ask why.
questions.questionEn: Did Vasilisa feel safe about this trip?
questions.explanationZh: 她沒有回頭、也沒有問為什麼——奶奶說，她知道這條路很危險，但她只能走。這不是覺得安全，而是沒有別的辦法，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她沒有回頭。她沒有問為什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She knew the name Baba Yaga. Every child knew it.
questions.explanationZh: 她知道 Baba Yaga 這個名字。每個小孩都知道——奶奶說，但「知道」這件事，不會讓人覺得比較安心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She knew the name Baba Yaga. Every child knew it.
questions.sentenceZh: 她知道 Baba Yaga 這個名字，每個小孩都知道。
questions.question: Who knew the name Baba Yaga?
questions.explanationZh: 每個孩子都知道——所以是「所有小孩」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In the village, mothers only spoke that name as a quiet whisper.
questions.question: How did people in the village say the name?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽們只敢「輕輕說」——那是怕被聽到、怕說出口會有事的那種害怕。
questions.sentenceZh: 村子裡的媽媽們說起那個名字，都只敢壓低聲音、輕輕說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Before she left, her mother had given her a small wooden doll.
questions.explanationZh: 在她離開之前，她的媽媽——親生媽媽——留給她一個小小的木娃娃。奶奶說，媽媽知道有一天女兒會需要它。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Before she left, her mother had given her a small wooden doll.
questions.sentenceZh: 在她離開之前，媽媽留給她一個小小的木娃娃。
questions.questionEn: Did her birth mother leave her something special?
questions.explanationZh: 親生媽媽留給她一個小木娃娃——答 Yes，她留了一樣東西。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Vasilisa take with her?
questions.question: What did she take?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽留給她的那個小木娃娃——那是她唯一帶走的東西。
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 帶了什麼一起走？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She put the doll deep in her pocket and stepped into the trees.
questions.explanationZh: 她把娃娃藏進口袋最深的地方，然後走進了樹林。奶奶說，那個小小的重量，給了她一點點勇氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She put the doll deep in her pocket and stepped into the trees.
questions.sentenceZh: 她把娃娃藏進口袋最深的地方，然後走進了樹林。
questions.question: Why did she put the doll deep in her pocket?
options: to keep it safe and close
to give it to Baba Yaga
questions.explanationZh: 藏進口袋最深處——她想保護它，讓媽媽留下的東西緊緊跟著她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa kept one hand on her pocket the whole way.
questions.question: Why did she keep her hand on the pocket?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽留的那個小木娃娃就在口袋裡——她一路用手護著，那是她唯一的陪伴。
questions.sentenceZh: 她一路把手放在口袋上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A small girl walks into the dark forest, all alone, with only a doll.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: a happy daytime walk with friends
one lonely girl heading into danger
optionsZh: 白天和朋友快樂地散步
一個孤單的小女孩走向危險
questions.explanationZh: 一個小女孩，只帶著一個娃娃，走進黑漆漆的森林——奶奶說，光是想這個畫面，心裡就揪起來了。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個小女孩走進黑漆漆的森林，只有一個人，只帶著一個娃娃。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Nobody who left to find her ___ come back.
questions.sentenceZh: 沒有任何人去找過她，之後回來過。
questions.question: Which word fits best?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去的事，所以用 had——「Nobody... had come back」，是過去完成式喔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Everyone knew the name Baba Yaga. Nobody who left to find her had come back...
questions.explanationZh: 每個人都知道 Baba Yaga 這個名字。但是，沒有人去找過她之後，回來過……奶奶說完，停了好一會兒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa kept one hand on her pocket the whole way.
questions.sentenceZh: 她一路把手放在口袋上。
questions.questionEn: Did she feel calm and carefree on her walk?
questions.explanationZh: 手一直放著口袋，護著那個娃娃——她很緊張，不是輕輕鬆鬆的。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In the village, mothers only spoke that name as a quiet whisper.
questions.sentenceZh: 村子裡的媽媽們說起那個名字，都只敢壓低聲音、輕輕說。
questions.question: How did villagers say Baba Yaga's name?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽們只敢小聲說——就是「輕聲低語」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Everyone knew the name Baba Yaga. Nobody who left to find her had come back.
questions.sentenceZh: 每個人都知道 Baba Yaga 這個名字。但是，沒有人去找過她之後，回來過。
questions.question: What does this tell us about Baba Yaga?
options: a kind and gentle old woman
living right next to the village
questions.explanationZh: 沒有人去找她回得來——這說明她「非常危險」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚要學的 4 個字，剛剛好！
🔑 rider = 騎士
🔑 white = 白
🔑 red = 紅
🔑 black = 黑
這三個顏色，今晚都會出現一次喔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The path was thin. The trees were tall and black.
questions.explanationZh: 小路很細，只有一個人走的寬。樹又高又黑，把天空都遮住了。奶奶說，那路走起來，一定黑得看不清楚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 三種顏色都在今晚故事裡出現了，配對看看記住了沒！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For a long time, nothing moved beside her.
questions.questionEn: Was the forest full of people?
questions.explanationZh: 「很久」、「什麼都沒動」——那片林子靜悄悄的，就她一個人，哪裡有什麼人？答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 很長一段時間，她旁邊什麼都沒動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A white rider on a white horse passed her. Then the day came.
questions.explanationZh: 一個穿著白衣的騎士，騎著白馬從她身邊經過。然後，天亮了。奶奶說，你看，白騎士帶著白天來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A white rider on a white horse passed her. Then the day came.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個白騎士騎著白馬從她身邊經過。然後，天亮了。
questions.question: What did the white rider represent?
questions.explanationZh: 白色騎士過去之後，白天來了——那就是「黎明」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After the white rider, the sky turned light.
questions.question: What did the white rider bring?
questions.explanationZh: 白騎士一過，天就亮了——他帶來的就是早晨的光。
questions.sentenceZh: 白騎士過去之後，天空亮了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A red rider on a red horse passed her. The sun stood high.
questions.explanationZh: 紅騎士騎著紅馬過去，太陽高高掛在天上。奶奶說，這一段，是一天最熱的時候了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A red rider on a red horse passed her. The sun stood high.
questions.sentenceZh: 紅騎士騎著紅馬過去，太陽高高掛在天上。
questions.questionEn: Did the red rider come before the white rider?
questions.explanationZh: 白騎士先來（天亮），紅騎士後來（中午）——紅騎士是在白騎士之後的。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What time did the red rider bring?
questions.question: What time?
questions.explanationZh: 太陽高高的——白=早晨、紅=中午！就是正中午啦。
questions.sentenceZh: 紅騎士帶來了什麼時間？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She walked on. She did not stop. She did not eat.
questions.explanationZh: 她繼續走。沒有停。沒有吃東西。奶奶說，她一直在走，因為她知道，停下來就更可怕。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A red rider on a red horse ___ her.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個紅騎士騎著紅馬，從她身邊經過。
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去發生的事，所以用過去式 passed——動詞後面加 -ed 就是過去式喔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her legs grew heavy. Her feet hurt. Still she walked.
questions.question: How did Vasilisa feel?
questions.explanationZh: 腿重、腳痛——但她還是走，一步一步撐下去。這就是很累但還在堅持的樣子。
questions.sentenceZh: 她的腿越來越重，腳也好痛。但她還是走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After the red rider, a black rider on a black horse came up the path.
questions.question: What did the black rider mean was coming?
questions.explanationZh: 白騎士=白天，紅騎士=中午——那黑騎士來了，當然就是夜晚要到了！
questions.sentenceZh: 在紅騎士之後，一個黑騎士騎著黑馬走上了小路。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She walked on. She did not stop. She did not eat.
questions.sentenceZh: 她繼續走。沒有停。沒有吃東西。
questions.question: What does this tell us about Vasilisa?
questions.explanationZh: 沒停、沒吃——她「下定決心繼續走」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The black rider passed her. Night fell on the forest. She was not safe...
questions.explanationZh: 黑騎士經過，夜降臨了。森林裡一片漆黑。奶奶輕聲說：她，不安全了……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After the red rider, a black rider on a black horse came up the path.
questions.sentenceZh: 在紅騎士之後，一個黑騎士騎著黑馬走上了小路。
questions.questionEn: Was the black rider the last of the three riders?
questions.explanationZh: 白→紅→黑，黑騎士是最後一個。答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her legs grew heavy. Her feet hurt. Still she walked.
questions.sentenceZh: 她的腿越來越重，腳也好痛，但她還是走。
questions.question: How did Vasilisa's body feel?
questions.explanationZh: 腿重、腳痛——是「沉重又痛」的感覺。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: White for morning, red for midday, black for night — three riders, three times of day.
questions.sentenceZh: 白=早晨，紅=中午，黑=夜晚——三個騎士，三個時間。
questions.question: What do the three riders represent together?
questions.explanationZh: 白=早、紅=中午、黑=晚上——代表「早上、中午和晚上」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚要學的字很特別，把它記好！
🔑 fence = 圍籬
🔑 bone = 骨頭
🔑 skull = 頭骨
🔑 house = 屋子
聽完故事，你會記得一輩子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last she came to a wide open place in the trees.
questions.explanationZh: 走了好久好久，Vasilisa 終於來到樹林裡一塊空地。奶奶說，她一定是又累又害怕——但眼前的景象，更讓她說不出話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚出現的特別詞彙，配對記一記！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In front of her stood a fence. It was not made of wood. It was made of white bones.
questions.question: What was the fence made of?
questions.explanationZh: 不是木頭——是骨頭！Baba Yaga 的院子，用白骨當圍籬，奶奶說，光是想到就起雞皮疙瘩了。
questions.sentenceZh: 她前面有一道籬笆。不是木頭做的。是白骨做的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On each post sat a skull. The eyes glowed in the dark.
questions.explanationZh: 每一根柱子上，放著一個頭骨。那些眼睛，在黑暗裡發出光。奶奶說，那樣的光，不是讓人安心的光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In front of her stood a fence. It was not made of wood. It was made of white bones.
questions.sentenceZh: 她前面有一道籬笆。不是木頭做的。是白骨做的。
questions.question: What was unusual about the fence?
options: very short and easy to climb
questions.explanationZh: 不是木頭做的，是白骨——柵欄「用白骨搭成」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Light came out of the skulls, soft and yellow.
questions.questionEn: Were the skulls just dead bones?
questions.explanationZh: 頭骨會發光——普通的骨頭不會發光的！這代表它們有魔法，不是一般死骨頭，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 頭骨裡透出淡淡的黃光，軟軟的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Inside the fence was a small house.
questions.explanationZh: 骨頭圍籬的裡面，有一間小小的屋子。奶奶說，看到這裡，Vasilisa 一定屏住了呼吸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On each post sat a skull. The eyes glowed in the dark.
questions.sentenceZh: 每一根柱子上，放著一個頭骨，那些眼睛在黑暗裡發光。
questions.questionEn: Were the skulls just ordinary dead bones?
questions.explanationZh: 普通骨頭不會發光——它們的眼睛有光，代表有魔法。答 No，不普通。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was strange about the small house?
questions.question: What was strange?
questions.explanationZh: 那間屋子——是用雞腳站著的！奶奶說，天底下就只有 Baba Yaga 的屋子是這樣蓋的。
questions.sentenceZh: 那間小屋子，哪裡奇怪？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The legs turned slowly. The whole house moved.
questions.explanationZh: 雞腳慢慢地轉動，整間屋子跟著動起來。奶奶說，你有沒有看過，一間屋子自己會走的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Inside the fence was a small house.
questions.sentenceZh: 骨頭圍籬的裡面，有一間小小的屋子。
questions.question: What did Vasilisa find inside the bone fence?
questions.explanationZh: 柵欄裡有一間小屋子——選「一間小木屋」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The door of the house had been facing away from Vasilisa.
questions.question: Why did the house turn?
optionsZh: 把門藏起來、不讓 Vasilisa 看
questions.explanationZh: 門本來背對著她，屋子轉了一圈——轉完之後，門剛好面對著她了！
questions.sentenceZh: 屋子的門本來是背對著 Vasilisa 的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A house with legs turns by itself so its door looks at the girl.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: one house that moves by itself
a tall tree falling in the wind
questions.explanationZh: 屋子長著腳、會自己轉——這一段要告訴我們的，就是這間屋子不是普通的屋子，它自己會動！
questions.sentenceZh: 一間有腳的屋子，自己轉過來，讓門對著那個女孩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The legs turned slowly. The whole house moved.
questions.sentenceZh: 雞腳慢慢地轉動，整間屋子跟著動起來。
questions.questionEn: Could a normal house move by itself?
questions.explanationZh: 普通的屋子不會自己動——這間屋子有魔法！答 No，普通屋子不會動。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The door stopped right in front of her. Then it opened by itself...
questions.explanationZh: 門剛好停在她正前方。然後，它自己打開了……奶奶說，故事到這裡，呼吸都要屏住了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: At last she came to a wide open place in the trees.
questions.sentenceZh: 走了好久，Vasilisa 終於來到樹林裡一塊空地。
questions.question: How did Vasilisa feel when she arrived?
questions.explanationZh: 走了那麼久、看到骨頭圍籬和發光的頭骨——她一定是「又累又害怕」的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The door of the house had been facing away from Vasilisa.
questions.sentenceZh: 屋子的門本來是背對著 Vasilisa 的。
questions.question: What happened when the house turned?
questions.explanationZh: 門原本背對她，現在朝著她——「門朝她這邊了」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The door stopped right in front of her. Then it opened by itself.
questions.sentenceZh: 門剛好停在她正前方。然後，它自己打開了。
questions.questionEn: Did someone inside open the door for her?
questions.explanationZh: 門自己打開——沒有人開，是自己開的，答 No。

storyBeat: 巫婆回家 — 「我聞到俄羅斯女孩」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的字很有畫面感！
🔑 old = 老
🔑 nose = 鼻子
🔑 teeth = 牙齒
🔑 smell = 聞
準備好，Baba Yaga 要出現了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa stepped inside. The house was warm. The fire was high.
questions.explanationZh: Vasilisa 走進去。屋子裡暖暖的，火燒得很大。但奶奶說，這樣的暖，讓人更不安心。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的字跟 Baba Yaga 的樣子有關，配對記一記！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She stood by the wall and did not sit down.
questions.questionEn: Did she feel at home here?
questions.explanationZh: 她靠著牆站著、不敢坐——這哪裡是在自己家的感覺？她很緊張、很不自在，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她靠著牆站著，沒有坐下來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Outside, something big and round came through the trees.
questions.explanationZh: 屋外，有一個大大的、圓圓的東西，從樹林裡穿過來。奶奶說，就是那個……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa stepped inside. The house was warm. The fire was high.
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 走進去，屋子裡暖暖的，火燒得很大。
questions.question: What was the inside of the house like?
questions.explanationZh: 暖和、火旺——屋子裡是「暖和、火旺旺的」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Outside, the stone bowl came closer through the trees.
questions.question: How did Baba Yaga move?
questions.explanationZh: 「大又圓的東西」就是石碗——Baba Yaga 坐在石碗裡，從樹林裡飄過來的。
questions.sentenceZh: 屋外，一個石碗從樹林間越來越靠近。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her nose was long like a piece of iron. Her teeth were long too.
questions.explanationZh: 她的鼻子長長的，像一根鐵條。牙齒也很長。奶奶說，這樣的臉，你在夢裡見到一定醒過來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She stood by the wall and did not sit down.
questions.sentenceZh: 她靠著牆站著，沒有坐下來。
questions.questionEn: Was Vasilisa relaxed when she entered the house?
questions.explanationZh: 靠著牆、不敢坐——她緊張得不行，當然不放鬆。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Baba Yaga look?
questions.question: How did she look?
questions.explanationZh: 長鼻子、長牙齒、坐石碗——這是一個非常非常老的巫婆！
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 看起來是什麼樣子？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga stopped at the door. She lifted her nose.
questions.explanationZh: Baba Yaga 在門口停下來。她把鼻子往空中一抬——奶奶說，她在找味道。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her nose was long like a piece of iron. Her teeth were long too.
questions.sentenceZh: 她的鼻子長長的，像一根鐵條，牙齒也很長。
questions.question: How did Baba Yaga look?
questions.explanationZh: 鼻子像鐵棒——她「又老、鼻子長」，還有長牙。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She turned her head left and right, breathing in the air.
questions.question: What was Baba Yaga doing at the door?
questions.explanationZh: 頭左右晃、用力吸氣——她在用鼻子找氣味，就是在「聞空氣」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她把頭左右晃，大力吸著空氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga came in and looked straight at Vasilisa.
questions.question: How did Baba Yaga know a person was inside?
questions.explanationZh: 她在門口用力聞、到處嗅——就是靠著鼻子，才知道屋裡有人的。
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 走進來，眼睛直直地看向 Vasilisa。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Outside, something big and round came through the trees.
questions.sentenceZh: 屋外，有一個大大的、圓圓的東西，從樹林裡穿過來。
questions.questionEn: Was Baba Yaga walking on her feet like a normal person?
questions.explanationZh: 那個大又圓的東西是石碗——她坐在石碗裡移動，不是用腳走路。答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I smell a Russian girl," she said. "Why are you here?"
questions.explanationZh: 「我聞到一個俄羅斯女孩，」她說。「妳為什麼在這裡？」奶奶說，這一刻，Vasilisa 一定嚇壞了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga stopped at the door. She lifted her nose.
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 在門口停下來，她把鼻子往空中一抬。
questions.question: What was Baba Yaga doing with her nose?
questions.explanationZh: 她把鼻子抬起來，在找味道——就是「在嗅空氣」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I smell a Russian girl," she said. "Why are you here?"
questions.sentenceZh: 「我聞到一個俄羅斯女孩，」她說，「妳為什麼在這裡？」
questions.question: How did Baba Yaga find out Vasilisa was inside?
questions.explanationZh: 「我聞到一個俄羅斯女孩」——Baba Yaga 是靠「聞到氣味」才知道的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga came in and looked straight at Vasilisa.
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 走進來，眼睛直直地看向 Vasilisa。
questions.questionEn: Was Baba Yaga gentle and welcoming?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛直直盯著她，馬上問「妳為什麼在這裡」——不是溫和的歡迎方式。答 No。

storyBeat: 不可能的事 — 娃娃,幫我

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的字不難，來認識！
🔑 work = 工作
🔑 pile = 一堆
🔑 sand = 沙
🔑 sleep = 睡
記好這幾個，今晚的任務你就能聽懂了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa said quietly, "Grandmother, I came for fire."
questions.explanationZh: Vasilisa 輕輕說：「奶奶，我來拿火。」她叫她「奶奶」——奶奶說，這是因為她很有禮貌，也因為她想讓 Baba Yaga 感覺親近一點。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 今晚的詞彙，配對看看！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga laughed loud. "First, do my work. Then we will talk about fire."
questions.question: What did Baba Yaga want first?
questions.explanationZh: 先做完工作，再說火的事——Baba Yaga 說清楚了，要先把工作做好，才談別的。
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 大聲笑了。「先把我的工作做完，再談火的事。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She pointed to a great pile of rice mixed with black sand.
questions.explanationZh: 她指著一堆東西——白米跟黑沙全混在一起，那麼大一堆。奶奶說，光是看一眼，手就發軟了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa said quietly, "Grandmother, I came for fire."
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 輕輕說：「奶奶，我來拿火。」
questions.question: Why did Vasilisa call Baba Yaga 'Grandmother'?
optionsZh: Baba Yaga 要求她這樣叫
questions.explanationZh: 叫「奶奶」是為了「禮貌、拉近距離」——讓 Baba Yaga 感覺親近一點。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Sort the rice from the sand before morning, or I will keep you here.
questions.questionEn: Was this work easy to finish in one night?
questions.explanationZh: 那麼大一堆米和沙混在一起，還要在一個晚上分完——奶奶說，這根本是不可能的任務，答案當然是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 「天亮之前，把米跟沙分開，不然我就把妳留在這裡。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga went to bed. The skulls glowed by the wall.
questions.explanationZh: Baba Yaga 去睡了。頭骨在牆邊發出淡淡的光。整間屋子靜得讓人害怕。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga laughed loud. "First, do my work. Then we will talk about fire."
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 大聲笑了，「先把我的工作做完，再談火的事。」
questions.questionEn: Did Baba Yaga give fire to Vasilisa right away?
questions.explanationZh: 她說「先做工作」——不是馬上給火。答 No，要先工作。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What gave light in the room?
questions.question: What gave light?
questions.explanationZh: Baba Yaga 睡了，頭骨在牆邊發著光——那是整個房間唯一的光源。
questions.sentenceZh: 什麼東西在房間裡發光？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa sat by the pile. She did not know where to start.
questions.explanationZh: Vasilisa 坐在那堆米和沙旁邊，不知道要從哪裡開始。奶奶說，她一定覺得，這是不可能完成的事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She pointed to a great pile of rice mixed with black sand.
questions.sentenceZh: 她指著一堆東西——白米跟黑沙全混在一起，那麼大一堆。
questions.question: What task did Baba Yaga give Vasilisa?
options: cook a big pot of soup
questions.explanationZh: Baba Yaga 要她「把米和沙分開」——那一大堆混在一起的米和黑沙。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Tears almost came up. But she put her hand into her pocket.
questions.question: What did Vasilisa do when she felt lost?
questions.explanationZh: 眼淚快掉下來，她把手伸進口袋——她在找娃娃，那個媽媽留給她的小木娃娃。
questions.sentenceZh: 眼淚差點就要流出來了，但她把手伸進了口袋。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A scared girl sits by an impossible job and reaches for her mother's small gift.
questions.question: What is this scene mainly showing?
options: one girl finding her only source of help
crying and giving up at last
teaching a lesson to a witch
optionsZh: 一個女孩找到了唯一的依靠
questions.explanationZh: 什麼都沒有了，只剩那個娃娃——奶奶說，在最絕望的時候，她伸手去拿媽媽留給她的那個依靠。
questions.sentenceZh: 一個害怕的小女孩坐在一個不可能完成的任務旁，伸手去拿媽媽留下的小禮物。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga ___ to bed. The skulls glowed by the wall.
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 去睡了，頭骨在牆邊發著光。
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去發生的事，要用過去式——go 的過去式是 went，不是 goed 喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She took the small doll out. "Help me," she whispered. The doll opened its eyes...
questions.explanationZh: 她把小娃娃拿出來。「幫我，」她輕聲說。娃娃，睜開了眼睛……奶奶說完，沒有立刻說下去，讓這句話在空中停了一下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Tears almost came up. But she put her hand into her pocket.
questions.sentenceZh: 眼淚差點就要流出來了，但她把手伸進了口袋。
questions.questionEn: Did Vasilisa give up and cry?
questions.explanationZh: 眼淚「差點」流出來，但她沒哭——她把手伸進口袋去找娃娃。答 No，她沒有放棄哭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa sat by the pile. She did not know where to start.
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 坐在那堆米和沙旁邊，不知道要從哪裡開始。
questions.question: How did Vasilisa feel looking at the task?
optionsZh: 不知所措、感覺快撐不住
questions.explanationZh: 不知道從哪裡開始——那麼大一堆，她「不知所措、感覺快撐不住」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She took the small doll out. "Help me," she whispered. The doll opened its eyes.
questions.sentenceZh: 她把小娃娃拿出來，輕聲說：「幫我。」娃娃，睜開了眼睛。
questions.question: What happened when Vasilisa asked the doll for help?
questions.explanationZh: 娃娃睜開了眼睛——「娃娃活了起來」，媽媽的禮物真的有魔法！

storyBeat: 帶光回家 — 新太太化成灰

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
最後一課！4 個字，學起來！
🔑 dawn = 天亮
🔑 surprised = 驚訝
🔑 carry = 帶
🔑 ash = 灰
最後那個字——灰——是這個故事最讓奶奶覺得厲害的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The doll worked all night. The rice was sorted by dawn.
questions.explanationZh: 娃娃做了整整一夜的工。天亮的時候，米都分好了，沙也分好了。奶奶說，那是媽媽的愛在幫她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words from tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh: 最後一課的字！配對記一記吧！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: When Baba Yaga woke up, she saw the rice in one pile and sand in another.
questions.question: How did Baba Yaga feel when she saw the work done?
questions.explanationZh: 這明明是不可能完成的事，結果全做好了——Baba Yaga 一定嚇了一跳，是驚訝！
questions.sentenceZh: Baba Yaga 醒來，看見米在一堆，沙在另一堆。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Baba Yaga did not ask how. She gave a long, careful look at the girl.
questions.explanationZh: Baba Yaga 沒問怎麼做到的。她長長地、仔細地看著 Vasilisa——奶奶說，這眼神，像在看一個不一樣的人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The doll worked all night. The rice was sorted by dawn.
questions.sentenceZh: 娃娃做了整整一夜的工，天亮的時候，米都分好了。
questions.question: Who finished the impossible task?
questions.explanationZh: 「娃娃做了整整一夜的工」——是「那個小娃娃」把任務完成的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After a long silence, she said, "Take your fire and go."
questions.questionEn: Did Baba Yaga let Vasilisa leave?
questions.explanationZh: 「拿著火，走吧」——這就是放她走了。答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 沉默了好久之後，她說：「拿著妳的火，走吧。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave Vasilisa a skull with glowing eyes on a stick.
questions.explanationZh: 她給了 Vasilisa 一個頭骨，插在棍子上，眼睛還在發光。奶奶說，這是 Baba Yaga 給的火，不是一般的火。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: After a long silence, she said, "Take your fire and go."
questions.sentenceZh: 沉默了好久之後，她說：「拿著妳的火，走吧。」
questions.questionEn: Was Baba Yaga happy to let Vasilisa leave?
questions.explanationZh: 她沉默了很久才說放她走——這不像是「開心」放她走，而是不得不承認任務完成了。答 No，她不是高興地放走的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Vasilisa carry home?
questions.question: What did she carry?
questions.explanationZh: Baba Yaga 給的是頭骨上的光——那是巫婆的火，Vasilisa 就這樣帶著它走回家。
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 帶什麼回家？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa carried the light back through the dark woods.
questions.explanationZh: Vasilisa 帶著那個光，穿過黑黑的樹林，一步一步走回家。奶奶說，她一路上，一定緊緊抱著那根棍子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave Vasilisa a skull with glowing eyes on a stick.
questions.sentenceZh: 她給了 Vasilisa 一個頭骨，插在棍子上，眼睛還在發光。
questions.question: What was special about the skull Baba Yaga gave?
questions.explanationZh: 骷髏頭有發光的眼睛——答案是「有發光的眼睛」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Back at her house, her father's wife opened the door and stared.
questions.question: Who came out to see the light?
questions.explanationZh: 「爸爸的太太」——就是繼母、新太太，是她出來開的門。
questions.sentenceZh: 回到家，爸爸的太太打開門，愣在那裡看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The glowing eyes turned to her. She could not look away.
questions.explanationZh: 那發光的眼睛，慢慢轉向她。繼母想移開視線，卻移不開。奶奶說，那光，好像認識她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Vasilisa carried the light back through the dark woods.
questions.sentenceZh: Vasilisa 帶著那個光，穿過黑黑的樹林，一步一步走回家。
questions.questionEn: Did Vasilisa return home through the dark forest?
questions.explanationZh: 「穿過黑黑的樹林走回家」——答 Yes，她是穿過黑暗的森林回家的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In a single breath, the new woman turned to ash. Vasilisa held the light close...
questions.explanationZh: 一口氣的時間，新太太化成了灰。Vasilisa 把那個光緊緊抱在胸口……奶奶說，這就是故事的最後了，孩子。善良的人，有媽媽在保護。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The glowing eyes turned to her. She could not look away.
questions.sentenceZh: 那發光的眼睛，慢慢轉向她，繼母想移開視線，卻移不開。
questions.question: How did the new wife react to the glowing skull?
questions.explanationZh: 發光的眼睛轉向她，她移不開視線——「沒辦法移開視線」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In a single breath, the new woman turned to ash. Vasilisa held the light close.
questions.sentenceZh: 一口氣的時間，新太太化成了灰。Vasilisa 把那個光緊緊抱在胸口。
questions.question: What happened to the new wife at the end?
questions.explanationZh: 一口氣就化成塵灰——後母「化成一堆灰塵」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In a single breath, the new woman turned to ash.
questions.sentenceZh: 一口氣的時間，新太太化成了灰。
questions.questionEn: Did Vasilisa's bravery help her in the end?
questions.explanationZh: 她勇敢進森林、做完任務、帶火回家——最後的結果，她的勇氣確實幫了她。答 Yes。
